changes.value: Delete Task, Tag, Column, Board, Swimlane, Position interfaces. Remove adapter functions. Remove/deprecate list_tasks, old get_board. Remove task_entity_to_rich_json, column_entity_to_json, tag_entity_to_json, swimlane_entity_to_json.
Card 9: Remove typed interfaces and old backend shaping
